caption:
For the last 22 years I've walked beside women — in the clinic and in the classroom.
But above all, my heart has always been in education.

Hundreds of permanent makeup students have passed through my hands. And every single time, I saw the fear, the lack of confidence, and the deep, deep desire to succeed.
I knew exactly what they were feeling — because I lived through it at the start of my own career.

So I was always there. After the courses, in the late-night anxious questions and second-guessing — I gave them the mentorship and the safety net I wish I'd had when I was starting out.

Those years grew a dream inside me: to turn this calling into something much bigger.

I'm here to share that alongside my clinical work, I'm building a new project right now — the fruit of everything I've experienced with my students.
Something that will let every permanent makeup artist feel like she has me by her side, even outside the classroom.

I'm moved to the depths of my soul, and I'll share more soon.
This isn't a goodbye — it's an expansion.
My calling is taking a new shape, and I'm going to share every part of this journey with you. Stay close.

Want to be first in line when LIN opens for early access?
Comment "ME" below and I'll personally add you to the priority waitlist.

#pmu #permanentmakeup #pmuartist #thepigmentcode #linpro

Sometimes the biggest things in our lives start completely by accident.

When I went to study cosmetology, I picked permanent makeup as an elective. No grand vision. I wasn't planning to make it my career. It was just one more class.

But in those first few sessions, something happened to me.
I discovered the wild power this craft holds —
how with just a few small needles and one right pigment,
you can change a woman's appearance, her confidence, the way she sees herself in the mirror.

And suddenly I understood — I'm influencing and changing women's lives.

It's a rare combination: on one side, art — because I've always had a creative eye and a love for tiny details. On the other side, a craft that genuinely changes lives.

That's where I fell in love with this field. And I'm proud to share that today, after so many years, I'm building you the tool that's going to change your professional life.

So you've got something to look forward to…

something is being born that redefines what "premium" really means.

and lets professionals work from the certainty of data —
not from gut feeling.

This is the moment our craft levels up.

The world of permanent makeup is entering a new era —
one where tone matching no longer depends solely on experience or the human eye,
but on smart technology that can see what you simply can't see alone.

The new app I'm developing, powered by AI, does exactly that.
It analyzes skin in depth, identifies hidden undertones,
and creates precise matches that prevent future color shifts.
No more guessing. No more surprises. Just scientific precision.

The revolution is on its way — and if you work in permanent makeup, you want to be there from day one.

Want to know the moment LIN launches and be among the first to access this technology?
Don't forget to follow.

Sometimes silence is the sign that real, big things are being built.

I'm just deep in the work behind the scenes.

These last few months I've been building something that's been brewing in my mind for a long time —
not just one tool…
but an entire system of knowledge and guidance for the world of permanent makeup.

Something that connects 22+ years of real clinical experience and a deep understanding of skin and pigments,
with smart tools that can help us work with far more precision and safety.

Things like this can't be built loud.
They take time, testing, precision… and a lot of quiet work.

So if you've wondered where I went —
that's exactly where I am.

And soon I'll start letting you in on what's been built behind the scenes… and I think you're going to lose it.

I'm curious to hear from you —
what's the ONE thing in permanent makeup that's hardest for you to understand or get precise on?
Drop it below or DM me — I read everything.

but the heart is so much calmer now.

After 22 years in permanent makeup,
between needle and pigment, I came to understand that the real magic happens
the moment we release the fear of getting it wrong.

Technology isn't here to replace your touch.
It's here to wrap that touch in confidence.

It's your quiet during the procedure —
the certainty that what your eyes see
is backed by AI and is the most precise match possible for your client.

Every one of us has had that moment in a session
where you wished for a "second pair of eyes" to help you.

And soon — every one of us will have those eyes. (LIN, launching soon.)

The human eye is incredible.
But it has a glass ceiling.

Biologically, we're limited to a certain range of tones
and to only 3 color sensors.
Which means critical data simply… disappears from our sight.

That's exactly why AI is changing the game.
It doesn't rely on vision —
it relies on precise mathematical data the eye can't process.

The app I'm developing was built to give you that "superhuman" sight,
so your match is scientific and exact —
not just visual.

Launch is approaching at full speed.
Don't forget to follow so you'll be the first to know when we go live.

A question I keep getting lately:

"Sivan, if your LIN app will recommend the exact pigment for me — why do I still need the course?"

Here's my answer: without the course, LIN's recommendation is just data on a screen.

Think about a doctor for a moment.
She studies medicine for 7+ years before she ever touches an MRI machine.
Why? Because the machine doesn't make her a doctor —
it makes a real doctor far more precise.

The course is the medical training.
LIN is the MRI.

The course teaches you to think like a master artist.
LIN (launching soon) will work alongside you on every single client — in real time.
Without the knowledge from the course, you won't understand WHY LIN suggested a specific pigment blend.
Without LIN, you'll do the same work — just slower, and with more doubt in your hands.

Together — you stop guessing. You know.

My early-access offer:
Every artist who joins the course gets locked-in lifetime pricing on LIN when it launches — pricing reserved exclusively for course students.

Save this post for the next time you ask yourself if you're "good enough."

I built an AI app that reads skin, detects undertone, and protects your client from pigment-matching mistakes.
But long before I ever spoke to a single development team —
I taught myself first.

Years of clinical work.
Thousands of clients.
Every mistake that cost me dearly.
Every insight that became a protocol I now live by.

All of that became my signature method — and then a digital course that has now passed through hundreds of artists.

And then?
All of it became LIN.

I taught the app to think exactly the way I think.
It doesn't just scan a photo.
It walks the same diagnostic path I teach in the course —
undertone, Fitzpatrick, pigment behavior.
Step by step. Exactly the way a master artist's mind works.

This isn't an app that replaces your judgment.
It's an app that sharpens it.

So why does the course matter if there's an app?
Because an app in the hands of an untrained artist —
is still an untrained artist.
You'll get pigment recommendations without truly understanding why.

But the course in the hands of an artist who also has LIN —
that's a stack no one in this industry has had access to before. The first of its kind.

The course is the brain.
The app is the tool.
Together — they make you unstoppable.

The course is open now.
LIN is coming soon.
You can start arming yourself today.

My fellow PMU artists —
I'm writing this with my heart in my throat.

After endless thought, precision, love, and obsessing over the smallest details —
my digital course is finally LIVE.

This isn't just another course.
This is the system I built to bring complete clarity to everything that's felt like chaos in your head until now —
skin diagnosis, tone and undertone, color theory, pigment matching, and confident decision-making in the treatment room.

This course was born from my most honest place:
to help us stop working from guesses, stop being afraid of mistakes, and start working from real professional confidence.

And that's exactly what's waiting for you inside:
- Deep knowledge that finally connects all the dots
- A clear, simple diagnostic method
- Confidence in your decisions
- A professional framework that connects to the technology and the app coming soon

If you've ever felt like you "kind of" know — but lack the precision that produces master-level results —
this is for you.

I truly believe this is going to change the way you look at skin, color, and pigments.
On a level you won't be able to un-see.

There's something almost no one tells you at the beginning of this career…

You can master perfect technique.
You can work with surgical precision.
But if you don't have a real understanding of skin and color —
you're guessing.

I was there too.

That moment standing in front of a client,
pigment in hand —
with one question circling in your head:
"Is this really right for her?"

It's not a lack of talent.
It's a lack of system.

Today I know:
real confidence doesn't come from experience —
it comes from understanding.

From the ability to read skin.
To identify undertone.
To know how a pigment will behave — before the needle ever touches.

And that's exactly what I built.

A method.
An order.
A professional logic.

No more guessing.
No more "I think."

Just knowledge that works.

I'm proud and emotional to introduce —

THE PIGMENT CODE
The Master Diagnostic Method

The digital course that will finally make sense of everything — once and for all.

If you feel like there's a fog in your head and you know you're capable of more —
that's not random.

Comment "CODE" and I'll send you the details.

#pmu #permanentmakeup #pmuartist #thepigmentcode #linpro

There are things you don't learn in any course.
Things that take years to figure out alone.

That moment —
when you're standing in front of a client,
doing exactly what you were taught…

But inside?

Something doesn't feel right.

You don't truly understand why you're choosing what you're choosing.
And you ask yourself —

How is it that I studied,
and I still don't really get it?

Then the doubt creeps in.
Maybe I'm not good enough…
Maybe I'm not smart enough…
Maybe this just isn't for me…

But the truth?

It's not you.

You were given technique —
without understanding.

I know that place intimately.
Way too intimately.

I went to countless trainings,
tried every method,
tested every pigment line,
spent serious money —
and every single time, I felt something missing.

I worked, I improved, I progressed —
but inside, I still didn't have certainty.

And it frustrated me to my core.
Because I knew I was capable of more —
I just didn't have the final piece of the puzzle.

Only when I stopped,
and started breaking it all down to the deepest level —
skin, undertone, healing, depth, pigments —

everything started clicking.

And suddenly…
it wasn't a guess anymore.
It was clear.

My hand stopped trying —
it knew.

And from that place,
I felt the calling.

To pave a path for the artists who truly want to make it.
Without the burns along the way.
Without the doubt and the second-guessing.

So I founded LIN.

A complete system that brings together in one place:

A smart app —
for precise analysis of tone, undertone, and pigment matching.

Digital courses —
that bring real clarity to your mind and teach you to UNDERSTAND, not just execute.

Professional resources —
charts, work maps, and clear daily-use guides.

And a deep knowledge foundation —
that connects every piece into one clear picture.

Because let's talk about the truth no one says out loud:

Technique?
You can drill it.
You can refine it.
It can be acquired.

But knowledge —
that's what separates average from masterful.

LIN was built to close that gap —
once and for all.

This isn't something you've seen here before.
And honestly, not even globally.

This is a different level of professionalism.
A level that leaves no room for guessing.

No matter where you are today —
this is what will catapult you to PRO.

LIN —
is not about learning more —
it's about UNDERSTANDING more.
About working from certainty.

LIN is launching soon. Join the waitlist — link in bio.

LIN — The New Standard of True Professionals.
